meta.title: Fast Forward >> Typing
meta.description: What if you could type as fast as you think? The modern typing tutor for adults.

home.headline: What if you could type as fast as you think?
home.subheadline: We'll help you get there. The modern typing tutor built for adults.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Take the free typing test. In just a few minutes you'll know exactly where you stand.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Guided lessons take you step by step to touch typing. At your own pace.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Complete the course and earn a certificate that proves your typing speed.

features.title: What you get
features.structuredDesc: 30 progressive lessons. Each builds on the last - no guessing, no skipping ahead.
features.guidanceDesc: See exactly which keys give you trouble. Targeted exercises for your specific weak spots.
features.progressDesc: WPM, accuracy, lesson progress - all at a glance. You see exactly how you're improving.
features.outcomesDesc: No endless practice without a goal. Clear milestones, measurable progress, a certificate at the end.

speedTest.title: How fast do you type?
speedTest.desc: Find out in just a few minutes. Free, no sign-up required.
speedTest.bullet2: Type real text, not random words
speedTest.mockText: The keyboard is the most important tool in our digital daily life. Every finger has its place, every key its purpose.

certificate.title: Get your certificate
certificate.desc: Take a typing test and receive an official certificate with your speed and accuracy. Or complete the typing course - your certificate is included.

teams.teachersDesc: Typing belongs in the classroom. Manage classes, track progress and integrate typing into your curriculum.
teams.companiesDesc: Faster typing, higher productivity. Set up teams, track results and boost efficiency across your organisation.

finalCta.title: Ready to type faster?
finalCta.desc: Start now - you'll see results after your very first lesson.

about.title: Type faster. Stress less.
about.intro: Millions of people type every single day - emails, messages, documents, code. But most never learned to do it properly. They look at the keyboard, use a few fingers, and it works. Sort of.
about.missionText: Touch typists are 40-60% faster than self-taught typists. That's not a motivational quote, that's data. The skill gap is real - and the tools to close it are long overdue.
about.missionText2: We built Fast Forward >> Typing because there was no tool that truly fit. Not a school program. Not a kids game. Not a speed test with no structure. A modern course for adults who spend their days at a computer and simply want to get better at it.
about.howText: A free typing test shows you where you stand. A structured 4-week course, 15 minutes a day, teaches you touch typing from scratch. A certificate proves you did it.
about.howText2: No subscription. No account required to start. No guilt trips when you skip a day.
about.languagesText: German, English, French - not translated, but natively written for each language. Because "du" is not "you" is not "tu".
about.ctaText: Start with the free typing test. Takes less than 5 minutes.
